title: MacroPad Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for MacroPad plugin manifest.json files

id.description: Unique plugin identifier. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Must match the GitHub repo suffix (macropad-plugin-{id}).

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the marketplace.

version.description: Semver version string. Must match the GitHub release tag (v{version}).

description.description: One or two sentence description shown in the marketplace card.

authorUrl.description: Link to the author's GitHub profile or website.

homepage.description: Link to the plugin's GitHub repo or docs page.

icon.description: Emoji or URL to a 128×128 PNG shown in the marketplace.

minAppVersion.description: Minimum MacroPad app version required to run this plugin.

actions.description: List of action keys this plugin handles. Each action maps to a component type the user can place on their macropad.

key.description: Unique action key. Must be prefixed with the plugin id (e.g. 'my-plugin.doThing').

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the component action picker.

description.description: Optional longer description shown as a tooltip.

componentType.description: Suggested component type for this action.

params.description: Configurable parameters the user sets in the admin panel. Passed to the handler as the params argument.

widgets.description: Optional live-data widgets this plugin can populate. Users drag these onto their grid and the plugin pushes updates via sdk.broadcast().

key.description: Event name passed to sdk.broadcast(key, data). Must be prefixed with the plugin id.

field.description: Which field of the broadcast payload to display. Defaults to 'value'.
